comment: QoE-6 invariant test results. error-severity failures indicate hard QoE-blocking inconsistencies; warn-severity failures are soft issues worth investigating. Generated by _etl_scripts/run_invariant_tests.mjs as the final step of refresh_all.

results.name: every churn_inferences entry is currently status=churned
no churn_inferences entry has a churn_reason in customer_profiles
no annual_payer appears in churn_inferences
unattributed count (profiles, excluding duplicates) = churn_inferences count
every customer_status_override is applied to its profile
every sub_instance_of_parent / duplicate_of override has an existing parent (and matching status for duplicates)
every annual_payer has a payer_details entry
every annual_amortization_override matches an annual_payer
each annual_payer has annualized monthly_history within past 18 months
every synthetic_transaction has a matching profile
mrr_by_month subscription ≈ sum of customer_profiles monthly_history (last 24 months, ±0.5%)
customer_profiles lifetime_subscription ≈ sum of monthly_history.subscription (±1%)
adjustments_register contains an entry for every annual_payer
adjustments_register contains an entry for every status_override
adjustments_register contains an entry for every synthetic_transaction
GAAP EBITDA = Net Income + Interest + Tax + D&A (within rounding)
Adjusted EBITDA = GAAP EBITDA + QoE adjustment total (within rounding)
no QoE adjustment is still a placeholder (banker-ready)
results.detail: 5 placeholders still in bridge — owner sign-off needed

results.name: every annual_payer is QoE-verified (payer_details.verified_by populated)
every annual_payer has a contract_link
stripe_qb_reconciliation: no month flagged status=investigate
all expected snapshots exist
